creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Created attachment 256376
ocaml-type_conv.patch

Hi,

Please deprecate devel/ocaml-type_conv as it is no longer maintained by upstream.
Upstream has subsumed it with ocaml-ppxlib and related ports.

From my understanding it may be scheduled for deletion as well, as there is no user of it in the ports tree.

Best regards,
Benjamin
